prompt: Fix partial IPv4 coloring for static route destinations
note: Generalized IPv4 partial-token recognition to destination, router_id, FIB ip, and next_hop parameters. ip route-static 1. is now ambiguous/yellow, a complete address is green, and impossible prefixes are red; 292 tests pass.
decisions: Model partial IPv4 coloring as a parser-level semantic shared by command families
